remediation.summary: Ensure required bootstrap records exist before worker registration.
steps: Verify tenant exists in the control-plane database.
Verify the plan referenced by the worker exists.
Verify the node record exists and is active.
commands: sqlite3 var/aos-cp.sqlite3 "SELECT id, status FROM nodes;"

remediation.summary: Run preflight to identify missing dependencies or configuration.
steps: Run the preflight checks to see failures.
Address failing checks or bypass only for local dev.

remediation.summary: Bypass is OK for local dev, but fix preflight issues for stability.
steps: Remove AOS_SKIP_PREFLIGHT once checks pass.
Re-run preflight to confirm readiness.

remediation.summary: Ensure enough available memory or adjust workload.
steps: Close other heavy processes and retry.
Verify memory with vm_stat or Activity Monitor.
Reduce model size or adapters if needed.

remediation.summary: A stale worker process or socket is blocking startup.
steps: Stop any running worker processes.
Remove stale socket and pid files if needed.

remediation.summary: Inspect worker logs and resolve the underlying startup error.
steps: Open worker logs for the crash reason.
Fix dependency or configuration errors, then restart.

remediation.summary: Worker started but UDS socket did not appear.
steps: Check worker logs for initialization errors.
Verify worker UDS path is writable.

remediation.summary: Inspect backend logs for errors during startup.
steps: Check backend logs for the failure reason.
Verify database and config are reachable.

remediation.summary: Inspect UI logs for errors during startup.
steps: Check UI logs for the failure reason.
Verify UI dependencies are installed.

remediation.summary: Single-node dev can ignore; production should ensure quorum.
steps: Confirm expected mode for this environment.
For production, ensure quorum and verification services are running.

remediation.summary: Ensure API calls include a valid Authorization token.
steps: Verify client is sending Authorization: Bearer <token>.
Check token validity and tenant permissions.

remediation.summary: Update config to supported variables.
steps: Run config validation and replace deprecated keys.
Check configs/*.toml and .env for old keys.

remediation.summary: Remove or correct unknown environment variables.
steps: Review env output for unknown AOS_* keys.
Remove or rename invalid entries.

remediation.summary: Inspect control-plane logs for the underlying request failure.
steps: Check the control-plane log file for error context.
Confirm backend service is healthy.

remediation.summary: Inspect control-plane logs for the underlying request failure.
steps: Find the paired request_error entries for context.
Confirm backend service is healthy.

rules.pattern: This usually indicates a startup error
rules.title: Service manager detected startup error

remediation.summary: Inspect service logs for the specific startup failure.
steps: Check the referenced service log for details.
Fix the underlying error and retry startup.

remediation.summary: Worker reported a failed status; inspect logs and restart.
steps: Check worker logs for the failure reason.
Restart the worker after resolving errors.

remediation.summary: Inspect backend logs for the startup failure.
steps: Check backend logs for the failure reason.
Verify database and config are reachable.

remediation.summary: UI did not stop gracefully; check for hung processes.
steps: Inspect UI logs for shutdown errors.
Restart UI if needed.

remediation.summary: Development drift is allowed but should be reviewed.
steps: Review drift details to ensure expected configuration.
Update configs or environment if needed.

remediation.summary: Review drift fields to ensure expected configuration.
steps: Inspect drift details in control-plane logs.
Align configs or environment if drift is unexpected.

rules.pattern: Failed to query runtime mode from database
rules.title: Runtime mode fallback to config

remediation.summary: Database lookup failed; check DB connectivity.
steps: Verify the control-plane database is available.
Check backend logs for DB errors.

remediation.summary: Single-node dev can ignore; production should ensure quorum.
steps: Confirm expected mode for this environment.
For production, ensure quorum and verification services are running.
